basic_details.short_information: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) recruits 20 Project Engineer Posts. Candidates with B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, M.E/M.Tech can attend for walk in

how_to_apply: BDL Project Engineer 2026 is a Walk-in Interview - there is no online application form. Candidates must appear directly at the venue with all required documents. Follow these steps:
